mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO email_notification_task (task_key, template_code, biz_type, biz_id, receiver_uid, receiver_role, email_type, email, subject, payload_json, scheduled_at, status, retry_count, max_retry_count, last_error) VALUES (#{taskKey}, #{templateCode}, #{bizType}, #{bizId}, #{receiverUid}, #{receiverRole}, #{emailType}, #{email}, #{subject}, #{payloadJson}, #{scheduledAt}, #{status}, #{retryCount}, #{maxRetryCount}, #{lastError})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM email_notification_task WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM email_notification_task WHERE task_key = #{taskKey} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE email_notification_task SET status = 'SENT', subject = #{subject}, sent_at = #{sentAt}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE email_notification_task SET status = 'CANCELED', last_error = #{reason}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE email_notification_task SET status = #{status}, last_error = #{lastError}, retry_count = #{retryCount}, scheduled_at = #{nextScheduledAt}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE email_notification_task SET status = 'CANCELED', last_error = #{reason}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE biz_type = #{bizType} AND biz_id = #{bizId} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'VALIDATING')
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM email_notification_task WHERE task_key LIKE CONCAT(#{taskKeyPrefix}, '%') AND status = 'SENT'
mapper.update: UPDATE email_notification_task SET status = 'PENDING', scheduled_at = #{nextScheduledAt}, last_error = NULL, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{id} AND status IN ('FAILED', 'CANCELED')
